description: After the club standoff, Simmons and Mack regroup at their hotel rendezvous. They reflect on the chaos, discuss their concern for Daisy, and share a candid conversation about relationships and the ongoing struggles within the team. Fitz eventually joins them, and after a vulnerable moment, FitzSimmons finally embrace their feelings and share intimacy, taking their relationship to a new level.

transcript.line: Oh. Thank God. Is Fitz with you?
But this is the rendezvous point.
Wait. H-Hold on, hold on. I just got back. He can't be too far behind. Plus, if you go out there looking for him and he comes back here, then this will go on all night.
You okay? You see Daisy?
Hive, or whatever it is. I shot him. Doubt it did anything. Always said I'd shoot Ward.
You think we'll get her back?
We have to.
I guess sometimes it's easier to think the world wants you to suffer than to believe it's got your back.
You should tell that to Fitz. He thinks we're cursed, which I know is ridiculous, but... I don't know.
So, how long have you two...?
Oh, no. No, we've... It's not...
You know how many times Bobbi and Hunter pulled the “my comms are broken” trick? Come on.
Right. Well, I... I don't know. I... I suppose it's very new.
No, it isn't.
All stations, targets secure. The head has been cut. I repeat the head has been cut. HYDRA has been eliminated.
Just like that.
Just like that. This should've been a great day.
Jemma?
Where have you been?
Looking for you.
Oh, well, I've been here at the rendezvous point like we discussed.
What? And Mack?
In the Quinjet, unloading equipment.
Well, we've got a lot to talk about.
Jemma.
Yeah?
Your hands are freezing.
Are they? Ooh. They're like little ice buckets, aren't they? Do you think you can brave it?
I'll do my best to power through.
